REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (10 Topaz Way S.F.)
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Barbara Kiersey (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $631,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $450,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
